title: ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR)
short_info: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) Project Research Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of ICMR NITVAR. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health with five years’ post qualification experience or PhD + two years post qualification experience, Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health with three years post-qualification experience or PhD, MBBS with three years’ post qualification experience OR MBBS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MPH) or equivalent OR MBBS with PhD
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist III (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health including the integrated PG degrees, with five years’ post qualification experience or PhD + two years post qualification experience. Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) / Data Manager: Post Graduate Degree in Health Science, Anthropology, Population Sciences, Psychology, Sociology, Public Health including the integrated PG degrees, with three years post-qualification experience or PhD. Project Research Scientist II (Medical): MBBS with three years’ post qualification experience OR MBBS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MPH) or any equivalent degree, including integrated PG degrees OR MBBS with PhD.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Research Scientist II (Non-Medical) / Data Manager

selection_process: Walk-In-Interview Written test if number of eligible candidates more than 30 for each position
